description: Letter from the wife of Khalaf b. Harūn to Maṣliaḥ Gaʾon (r. 1127–39 CE), seeking help against her cruel husband, written in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138). (Information from CUDL). Avraham the cantor and the wife of Abu 'l-Ma'ali Khalaf b. Harun, describing her husband's mistreatment of her and petitioning the Gaon to look into her plight.
description_he: מכתב מאשת חלף בן הרון לגאון מצליח, 1127–1139, על בעלה האכזרי, בכתב יד חלפון בן מנשה.
